title: Lantana lopez-palacii
taxonomy: Lantana lopez-palacii is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. It is native to Mexico and is a member of the Lantana genus. The species is part of the larger order Lamiales, which includes over 20,000 species of plants. The family Verbenaceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Lantana lopez-palacii is a rare and endemic species.

side_effects: Lantana lopez-palacii is a newly discovered species of flowering plant, and limited information is available about its side effects on humans.
